title: Ring Toss Legend
description:
Ring Toss Legend is a minimalist casual game about tossing rings onto prize pegs, earning coins, and upgrading your way toward bigger rewards.

Aim your throw, adjust the angle and power, and try to land rings on prize pegs with different values. Each successful toss earns coins, which can be spent on upgrades that improve your rewards, expand your options, and help you progress faster.

Features:

1. Physics-Based Ring Toss

 Control the direction, angle, and power of each throw.

2. Prize Peg Rewards

 Land rings on different prize pegs to earn coins based on their value.

3. Upgrade Progression

 Use earned coins to improve payouts, unlock new toss modes, expand ring options, and push toward bigger goals.

4. Multiple Toss Modes

 Start with manual tossing, then unlock faster ways to play as your progress grows.

5. A Bigger Challenge After the First Goal

 Reaching your first major milestone opens up a new layer of progression, giving you a larger goal to chase from a fresh point of view.

Ring Toss Legend is easy to pick up(or at least sort of easy..), and since everything is ready, now it's time to prove you are the legend!
description_short: Ring Toss Legend is a casual physics game where you toss rings onto prize pegs, earn coins, upgrade your skills, and chase bigger rewards as you explore new stages.
